senses.definition: used to emphasize that even a successful and capable individual can produce an offspring or product that is inferior or unsuccessful

examples.x: The chef was known for her delicious dishes, but even she had a few failed experiments, showing that many a good cow has a bad calf.
The parents were both highly successful doctors, but their son struggled in medical school, proving that many a good cow has a bad calf.

senses.definition: used to imply that a teacher who claims to know everything and teaches beyond their expertise may be doing more harm than good
